Customer360_SubtitleDefault: Unified view of revenue, trust, playbooks, and journey.
Marketing_Layout_MetaDefault: AutonomusFlow — autonomous operating system for revenue, customers, and governed AI.
Marketing_Landing_Hero: The system that detects, decides, and acts
Marketing_Landing_PageTitle: Autonomous operating system for revenue and customers
Marketing_Landing_MetaDescription: AutonomusFlow detects risk, recommends actions, and executes with human oversight. Protected revenue, avoided churn, governed AI.
Marketing_Landing_Lead: AutonomusFlow unifies revenue, Customer 360, governed AI, and executable actions. Fewer empty dashboards. More money protected and recovered.
Marketing_Landing_TaglineDesc: Not another CRM. It's the layer connecting customers, pipeline, AI decisions, and measurable outcomes — with human-in-the-loop before every real impact.
Marketing_Landing_ExecutiveNativeDesc: Answers board questions in plain language: which customers am I losing?, what revenue is at risk?, what did AI generate?
Marketing_Landing_ActionableDesc: Every insight includes tasks, emails, deals, and Trust approvals. From "I see the risk" to "I acted in one click."
Marketing_Landing_VsCrmBiDesc: Decision → revenue → learning attribution (Outcome Fabric), not just reports.
Marketing_Landing_VsCopilotsDesc: Trust Studio: simulate, approve, reject, and rollback before executing.
Marketing_Landing_VsCsToolsDesc: Customer 360 + playbooks + tickets in one OS, not five tabs.
Marketing_Landing_VsConsultingDesc: Autonomous agents + prioritized NBA; humans supervise exceptions.
Marketing_Landing_MoneyRiskTitle: How it makes money · How it reduces risk
Marketing_Landing_ExpansionDesc: identifies ready accounts and creates opportunities.
Marketing_Landing_TypicalResultDesc: Teams report executive visibility in <5 min, playbooks instead of spreadsheets, and board-ready AI governance.
Marketing_Demo_HeroLead: Walk through the CEO_DEMO tenant with executive data: 50 customers, attributed revenue, 8 Trust approvals, and one-click actions.
Marketing_Demo_Step1Desc: Use the CEO_DEMO tenant (auto-selected in demo environments).
Marketing_Demo_Step2Desc: Metrics: at-risk customers, expansion-ready, pending decisions, generated revenue (90d). Next Best Actions with executable buttons.
Marketing_Demo_Step3Desc: Generated · Protected · At risk · Expansion · Renewals. Insights with per-customer actions.
Marketing_Demo_Step4DescLine1: Command: revenue at risk, expansions, renewals, live decisions.
Marketing_Demo_Step4DescLine2: Trust: 8 pending approvals — simulate, approve, or reject.
Marketing_Demo_Step5DescLine1: Unified per-customer view: health, tickets, cases, journey, ABOS actions.
Marketing_Demo_Step5DescLine2: CS OS: risk, renewals, tickets, playbooks.
Marketing_Demo_Checklist: ✓ Which customers will I lose? · ✓ What will I expand? · ✓ Revenue at risk? · ✓ What did AI generate? · ✓ What do I approve today?
Marketing_Pricing_HeroLead: Three entry points aligned to value delivered today — without inflating uncertified capabilities.
Marketing_Pricing_PilotSubtitle: 1 tenant · up to 100 customers · self-serve demo
Marketing_Pricing_GrowthFeature1: Everything in Pilot + Customer Success OS
Marketing_Pricing_GrowthRequirements: Requires: live integrations, 2 references, SOC2 roadmap
Marketing_Pricing_EnterpriseFeature1: Everything in Growth + live autonomous agents
Marketing_Pricing_EnterpriseFeature3: SOC2 Type II · annual pen test
Marketing_Pricing_EnterpriseBlockers: Blockers: enterprise references, k6/load evidence, Salesforce bi-directional
Marketing_Roi_HeroLead: Estimate AutonomusFlow impact on protected revenue, avoided churn, and recovered renewals.
Marketing_Roi_Hint: Adjust your portfolio assumptions. Results are conservative estimates based on B2B SaaS pilot benchmarks.
Marketing_Roi_Assumptions: Assumptions: 35% of churn is preventable with early intervention · 12% of at-risk renewals recoverable · improvement applied to at-risk + renewal window subset.
Marketing_Stories_HeroTitle: From at-risk customer to protected revenue
Marketing_Stories_HeroLead: Representative ABOS flow in AutonomusFlow — based on the CEO_DEMO tenant and production playbooks.
Marketing_Stories_Step1Desc: Demo Customer 03 — health 42, churn 78%, 30d usage declining, $85k ARR contract. CS sees alert in Customer 360 and CS OS.
Marketing_Stories_Step2Desc: Churn engine + Customer Health classify Critical. Flow Command lists the account in "Revenue at risk". Memory records similar pattern with 62% historical rescue success.
Marketing_Stories_Step3Desc: Next Best Action: ExecuteRescuePlaybook — executive call within 24h, recovery plan, health follow-up. Trust requests approval (score 82 > threshold).
Marketing_Stories_Step4Desc: CS Manager runs "At-risk customer" playbook → 3 tasks created. CSM sends email from insight action. CRO opens $10k retention opportunity. Trust approves AI decision → communication + SLA task.
Marketing_Stories_Step5Desc: Ticket closed in 5 days · Health rises to 58 · Renewal confirmed · Outcome Fabric attributes $85k protected revenue to the decision → action → outcome chain. Learning indexed in Memory for the next similar case.
Marketing_Stories_BeforeDesc: Risk visible in a spreadsheet. No owner. No AI traceability. Board asks "what did we do?" — no answer.
Marketing_Stories_WithDesc: Unified detection → recommendation → in-app action → governed approval → measured outcome.
Marketing_Stories_MetricsDesc: CEO_DEMO: 10 at-risk customers · $2.1M revenue at risk · 15 deals won · 12 AI audits · 8 Trust pending.

Email_Welcome_Body: Hello {{name}}, thank you for trusting us. Your CS team will contact you soon.
Email_Onboarding_Body: Hello {{name}}, we have started your onboarding plan. Review your assigned tasks.
Email_Followup_Body: Hello {{name}}, we would like to know how your experience with the platform is going.
Email_Renewal_Body: Hello {{name}}, your contract renews on {{renewal_date}}. Let's coordinate the renewal.

Email_Reengagement_Body: Hello {{name}}, it has been a while. Can we help you get back on track?

WhatsApp_Recovery: Hello {{name}}, we noticed inactivity on your account. How can we help?

Audit_EventsByTypeSubtitle: Distribution of events recorded in the system.
Audit_FullTraceabilitySubtitle: Every action can be reconstructed and explained.
Audit_EventStoreDescription: All events are stored immutably. The complete system state can be reconstructed from scratch.
